news.headline: Armenia votes in test of PM Pashinyan's pivot away from Russia
news.summary: Armenians voted in a parliamentary election on Sunday as the incumbent government, under mounting Russian pressure, sought to loosen ties with Moscow and deepen cooperation with the West. news.headline: One dead, five wounded after shootings in Israel
news.summary: A Palestinian man with Israeli citizenship went on a shooting rampage in several towns in central Israel on Sunday, killing one person and wounding five others, according to Israeli police. news.headline: Misdiagnosis isn’t misconduct, lawyer for accused doctor tells medical watchdog
news.summary:
The lawyer for a Hong Kong doctor accused of professional misconduct after a boy in his care was left permanently disabled more than 16 years ago has told the medical watchdog that misdiagnosis or incompetence does not equate to misconduct.

news.headline: Australian doctor who underwent world-first brain tumour treatment dies
news.summary: The melanoma doctor's brain cancer treatment experiment has sparked hope for a breakthrough.

news.headline: Hundreds of captives freed from Boko Haram mountain hideout
news.summary: The group includes many women and children who were abducted in March from an area close to Cameroon.

news.headline: China urged to fast-track carrier fleet upgrades as Japan boosts strike power
news.summary:
